use_cases: Primary landing page section to drive user signups or conversions
Community growth pages showcasing social proof with founder avatars
SaaS product launch or marketing campaign hero sections
Startup landing pages emphasizing scale and user base
Lead generation pages with prominent call-to-action messaging
ai_summary: A vibrant purple gradient CTA hero section featuring social proof with overlapping user avatars and a bold headline. The component uses backdrop blur effects and a glass-morphism pill badge to convey community scale (1m+ founders). Designed as a high-impact landing section with responsive typography and gradient text for visual emphasis.
